summary: Current-tense authority claims are legal only when all active authority surfaces converge on the same subject head, posture, and authority source.
transition_note: Action 12 promotes the local truth ledger as the active current-head witness and purges main-bound live-truth responsibility. Published-head self-convergence remains unresolved until the ledger becomes an admissible published authority plane.
required_equalities: ledger current pointer truth_subject_commit == ledger current_state_receipt validated_head_sha
ledger current pointer truth_subject_commit == ledger runtime_closure_audit validated_head_sha
settled_truth_source_receipt pinned_head_sha == ledger current pointer truth_subject_commit
If git HEAD differs from ledger truth_subject_commit, the delta must be publication-carrier-only and HEAD must not be narrated as the validated subject
main current pointer/current_state/runtime are documentary only
H1_ACTIVATION_ALLOWED == false until published self-convergence is proven
required_truthful_green_predicates: minimum two-clean-clone proof is PASS on the published head
candidate adversarial posture is PASS_WITH_WARNINGS or stronger
